items.name: House Blend
items.description: Our signature medium roast with notes of chocolate and toasted almond.

items.name: Lavender Latte
items.description: Espresso with steamed oat milk and house-made lavender syrup.

items.name: Cold Brew
items.description: Slow-steeped for 18 hours. Smooth, bold, and refreshing over ice.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Double shot of espresso topped with velvety microfoam.

items.name: Jasmine Green
items.description: Delicate Chinese green tea scented with jasmine blossoms.

items.name: Chamomile Garden
items.description: Organic chamomile flowers with a hint of honey and lemon verbena.

items.name: Matcha Latte
items.description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked with your choice of milk.

items.name: Earl Grey Bloom
items.description: Classic bergamot-infused black tea with dried cornflower petals.

items.name: Almond Croissant
items.description: Buttery, flaky croissant filled with almond cream and topped with sliced almonds.

items.name: Lemon Poppy Seed Muffin
items.description: Bright citrus flavor with a tender crumb and crunchy sugar top.

items.name: Cinnamon Roll
items.description: Warm, gooey cinnamon swirl topped with cream cheese glaze.

items.name: Banana Walnut Bread
items.description: Moist banana bread studded with toasted walnuts. Served warm.

items.name: Rose Cardamom Latte
items.description: Espresso with rose water, cardamom, and steamed milk. A garden in a cup.

items.name: Seasonal Bloom Bowl
items.description: Acai smoothie bowl topped with edible flowers, granola, and fresh berries.

items.name: Honeycomb Affogato
items.description: Vanilla bean gelato drowned in a shot of espresso with honeycomb crumble.

items.name: Garden Herb Focaccia
items.description: Fresh-baked focaccia with rosemary, thyme, and sea salt from our rooftop garden.
